name: codex-science
description: Audited scientific skills, public-source tools, reproducible artifacts, and evidence review for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run reproducible scientific research in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Coordinate scientific work with an audited 149-skill catalog, read-only public data tools, structured provenance, and independent evidence review.
defaultPrompt: Investigate this question with an auditable research plan.
Find the right scientific skills for this analysis.
Review this result against its code and evidence.
